Dietary intake, Nutritional status, and Health outcomes among Vegan, Vegetarian and Omnivore families: results from the observational study

  • Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • View Source

Statistical report - mixed models summary

Authors and affiliations

Marina Heniková1,2, Anna Ouřadová1, Eliška Selinger1,3, Filip Tichanek4, Petra Polakovičová4, Dana Hrnčířová2, Pavel Dlouhý2, Martin Světnička5, Eva El-Lababidi5, Jana Potočková1, Tilman Kühn6, Monika Cahová4, Jan Gojda1


1 Department of Internal Medicine, Kralovske Vinohrady University Hospital and Third Faculty of Medicine, Charles University, Prague, Czech Republic.
2 Department of Hygiene, Third Faculty of Medicine, Charles University, Prague, Czech Republic.
3 National Health Institute, Prague, Czech Republic.
4 Institute for Clinical and Experimental Medicine, Prague, Czech Republic.
5 Department of Pediatrics, Kralovske Vinohrady University Hospital and Third Faculty of Medicine, Charles University, Prague, Czech Republic.
6 Department of Epidemiology, MedUni, Vienna, Austria.

This is a statistical report of the study that has been submitted to [TO BE ADDED]

When using this code or data, cite the original publication:

TO BE ADDED

BibTex citation for the original publication:

TO BE ADDED

Original GitHub repository: https://github.com/filip-tichanek/kompas_clinical

Statistical reports can be found on the reports hub.

Data analysis is described in detail in the statistical methods report.

1 Introduction

This project is designed to evaluate and compare clinical outcomes across three distinct dietary strategy groups:

  • Vegans
  • Vegetarians
  • Omnivores

The dataset is structured with data clustered within families, encompassing both adults and children. Children and adults are analyzed separately. The analysis for children is twofold: firstly, all children are considered as a single group with age (log2-transformed) serving as a covariate; secondly, a more detailed examination divides children into two age groups—those younger than 3 years and those 3 years and older.

1.1 Main Questions

The study aims to address the following key questions:

Q1. Do clinical outcomes vary significantly across different diet strategies?

Q2. Are there differences in the broader variability of clinical outcomes across diet groups, beyond just the average/median values?

Q3. Beyond diet group, what factors (such sex, age, breastfeeding status in children) are the most important drivers of clinical outcomes? How much are clinical charactersitics clustered within families?

Q4. Could the clinical characteristics effectively discriminate between different diet groups?

1.2 Statistical methods

Statistical modelling is described in detail in this report. Briefly, statistical methods used included:

The Kruskal-Wallis test and Mann-Whitney U test to compare unadjusted medians, Fisher test was used to compare unadjusted proportions (Q1).

Quantile regression (QR) was used to obtain adjusted differences in medians (Q1), 20th and 80th percentiles of the clinical characteristics (Q2), and to assess the relative importance of other covariates (Q3). Linear mixed-effects models (LME) provided information about adjusted differences between diet groups (Q1) and the importance of other variables, including clustering within families (Q3).
Both QR and LME were adjusted for confounders including age, sex, breast-feeding status (children), and relevant supplementation.

Elastic net logistic regression was employed to address Q4, offering a predictive perspective on the role of diet in determining clinical profiles.

Separate analyses were conducted for adults and children. For children, the analysis included a joint examination of all children, incorporating log2(age) as a covariate, and subgroup-specific analyses of children under and over 3 years of age separately.

2 Import initiation file

Open code 
source('368_initiation.R')

3 All children

3.1 Diet effects

3.1.1 Unstandardized effects

Open code 
diet_child_all <- read.xlsx("gitignore/data/diet_child_all_mixeff.xlsx") %>% 
  mutate(outcome = clean_outcome_names(outcome)) %>%
  mutate(outcome = case_when(
    outcome == 'FOLAT' ~ 'FOLATE',
    outcome == 'VKFE' ~ 'TIBC',
    outcome == 'Cros' ~ 'CTX',
    outcome == 'log2_Cros' ~ 'log2_CTX',
    outcome == 'VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'HOLOTC',
    outcome == 'log2_VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'log2_HOLOTC',
    TRUE ~ outcome
  ))

diet_child_all2 <- diet_child_all %>%   
  mutate(across(.cols = c(VN_OM_diff, VG_OM_diff, VN_VG_diff), ~ round(.x, 2)))


kbl(diet_child_all2, caption = 
      "Differences between diet groups across outcomes in all children, based on mixed models") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "(A) VN vs OM" = 3, 
                     "(B) VG vs OM" = 3, "(C) VN vs VG" =3)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')

(A) VN vs OM
(B) VG vs OM
(C) VN vs VG

3.1.2 Standardized effects by 1SD

Open code 
ids <- 11:46
inde <- min(ids)-1
ids <- ids-inde

sds <- vector("double", max(ids))

for(i in seq_along(ids)){
  sds[i] <- ifelse(grepl("log2", diet_child_all[(i), 1]),
                   sd(log2(dat_child_all[,(i+inde)]), na.rm = TRUE),
                   sd(dat_child_all[,(i+inde)], na.rm = TRUE))
}


diet_child_all_Z <- diet_child_all %>% 
  mutate(SD = sds) %>% 
  mutate(
    VN_OM_diff = VN_OM_diff/SD,
    VG_OM_diff = VG_OM_diff/SD,
    VN_VG_diff = VN_VG_diff/SD) %>% 
  select(-c(SD)) %>% 
  mutate(across(.cols = c(VG_OM_diff, VN_OM_diff, VN_VG_diff), ~ round(.x, 2)))


kbl(diet_child_all_Z, caption = 
      "Standardized differences between diet groups across outcomes in all children, based on mixed models") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "(A) VN vs OM" = 3, 
                     "(B) VG vs OM" = 3, "(C) VN vs VG" =3)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')

3.2 Vulcano plots

3.2.1 VN vs OM

Open code 

color_map <- c('OM+' = '#C97F00', 
               'VN+' = '#137000', 
               'VG+' = '#103CC9',
               'P>0.05' = 'grey50')

plotac <- 'fig19'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/',plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_child_all_Z %>% 
           filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VN_OM_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VN_OM_P,
             b_coe = VN_OM_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VN+', 
                 'OM+'))) %>%
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels = c('OM+', 'VN+', 'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>%
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha = 1, 
             box.padding = 0.3, 
             size = 3.5,
             seed = 17) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           scale_color_manual(values=color_map, name = '') + 
           ggtitle('VN vs. OM, all children') +
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
         )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

3.2.2 VG vs OM

Open code 

plotac <- 'fig20'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/',plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_child_all_Z %>% 
           filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           mutate(VG_OM_P = if_else(VG_OM_P < 1e-5, 1e-5, VG_OM_P)) %>% 
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VG_OM_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VG_OM_P,
             b_coe = VG_OM_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VG+', 
                 'OM+'))) %>%
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels = c('OM+', 'VG+', 'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>% 
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha=1, 
             box.padding = 0.3,
             size = 3.5,
             seed = 17) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') +  
           ggtitle('VG vs. OM, all children') +
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
         )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

3.2.3 VN vs VG

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig21'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/', plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_child_all_Z %>% 
             filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VN_VG_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VN_VG_P,
             b_coe = VN_VG_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VN+', 
                 'VG+'))) %>%
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels=c('VG+', 
                                      'VN+', 
                                      'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>% 
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha = 1, 
             box.padding = 0.5,
             size = 3.5,
             seed = 16) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', 
                y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') + 
           ggtitle('VN vs VG, all children') +
           
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
         )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

3.3 Covariates importance

3.3.1 Table

Open code 
AIC_child_all <- read.xlsx("gitignore/data/AIC_child_all_mixeff.xlsx") %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 1)),
         outcome = clean_outcome_names(outcome)) %>%
  rename(
    SEX = aSEX,
    BREASTFEED = Breast_Feed,
    `OTHER COV` = other_cov,
    FAMILY = family,
    DIET = diet,
    AGE = log2_age
  ) %>%
  mutate(outcome = case_when(
    outcome == 'FOLAT' ~ 'FOLATE',
    outcome == 'VKFE' ~ 'TIBC',
    outcome == 'Cros' ~ 'CTX',
    outcome == 'log2_Cros' ~ 'log2_CTX',
    outcome == 'VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'HOLOTC',
    outcome == 'log2_VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'log2_HOLOTC',
    TRUE ~ outcome
  ))

kbl(AIC_child_all, caption = 
      "Decrease of The Akaike information criterion (AIC) after addition of given outcome to mixed-effects model, all children. The change of AIC indicate out-of-sample predictive accuracy of the models and was bounded to -30 (large importance of a covariate, blue) and 0 (no to negliable importance, red).") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')
Decrease of The Akaike information criterion (AIC) after addition of given outcome to mixed-effects model, all children. The change of AIC indicate out-of-sample predictive accuracy of the models and was bounded to -30 (large importance of a covariate, blue) and 0 (no to negliable importance, red).

3.3.2 Heatmap

Open code 
heat_map(AIC_child_all, mixef = TRUE)

4 Young children

4.1 Diet effects

4.1.1 Unstandardized effects

Open code 

diet_child_young <- read.xlsx("gitignore/data/diet_child_young_mixeff.xlsx") %>% 
  mutate(outcome = clean_outcome_names(outcome)) %>%
  mutate(outcome = case_when(
    outcome == 'FOLAT' ~ 'FOLATE',
    outcome == 'VKFE' ~ 'TIBC',
    outcome == 'Cros' ~ 'CTX',
    outcome == 'log2_Cros' ~ 'log2_CTX',
    outcome == 'VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'HOLOTC',
    outcome == 'log2_VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'log2_HOLOTC',
    TRUE ~ outcome
  ))

diet_child_young2 <- diet_child_young %>%   
  mutate(across(.cols = c(VN_OM_diff, VG_OM_diff, VN_VG_diff), ~ round(.x, 2)))

kbl(diet_child_young2, caption = 
      "Differences between diet groups across outcomes in children < 3 years of age, based on linear models") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "(A) VN vs OM" = 3, 
                     "(B) VG vs OM" = 3, "(C) VN vs VG" =3)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')
Differences between diet groups across outcomes in children
(A) VN vs OM
(B) VG vs OM
(C) VN vs VG

4.1.2 Standardized effects by 1SD

Open code 

ids <- 11:46
inde <- min(ids)-1
ids <- ids-inde

sds <- vector("double", max(ids))
meds <- diet_child_young 

for(i in seq_along(ids)){
  sds[i] <- ifelse(grepl("log2",meds[(i), 1]),
                   sd(log2(dat_child_young[,(i+inde)]), na.rm=TRUE),
                   sd(dat_child_young[,(i+inde)], na.rm=TRUE))
}


diet_child_young_Z <- diet_child_young %>% 
  mutate(SD = sds) %>% 
  mutate(VN_OM_diff = VN_OM_diff/SD,
         VG_OM_diff = VG_OM_diff/SD,
         VN_VG_diff = VN_VG_diff/SD) %>% 
  select(-SD) %>% 
  mutate(across(.cols = c(VN_OM_diff, VG_OM_diff, VN_VG_diff), ~ round(.x, 2)))


kbl(diet_child_young_Z, caption = 
      "Standardized differences between diet groups across outcomes in children < 3 years of age, based on linear models") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "(A) VN vs OM" = 3, 
                     "(B) VG vs OM" = 3, "(C) VN vs VG" =3)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')

4.2 Vulcano plots

4.2.1 VN vs. OM

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig23'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/',plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_child_young_Z %>% 
           filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VN_OM_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VN_OM_P,
             b_coe = VN_OM_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VN+', 
                 'OM+'))) %>%
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels = c('OM+', 'VN+', 'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>%
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha = 1, 
             box.padding = 0.5, 
             size = 3,
             seed = 17) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') + 
           ggtitle('VN vs. OM, children < 3 years') +
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
         )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

4.2.2 VG vs OM

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig24'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/',plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_child_young_Z %>% 
           filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VG_OM_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VG_OM_P,
             b_coe = VG_OM_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VG+', 
                 'OM+'))) %>%
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels = c('OM+', 'VG+', 'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>%
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha = 1, 
             box.padding = 0.5, 
             size = 3,
             seed = 17) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') + 
           ggtitle('VG vs. OM, children < 3 years') +
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
         )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

4.2.3 VN vs VG

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig25'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/', plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_child_young_Z %>% 
             filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VN_VG_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VN_VG_P,
             b_coe = VN_VG_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VN+', 
                 'VG+'))) %>%
           
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels=c('VG+', 
                                      'VN+', 
                                      'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>% 
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha = 1, 
             box.padding = 0.5,
             size = 3,
             seed = 16) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', 
                y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') + 
           ggtitle('VN vs VG, children < 3 years') +
           
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
         )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

4.3 Covariates importance

4.3.1 Table

Open code 
AIC_child_young <- read.xlsx("gitignore/data/AIC_child_young_mixeff.xlsx") %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 1)),
         outcome = clean_outcome_names(outcome)) %>%
  rename(
    SEX = aSEX,
    BREASTFEED = Breast_Feed,
    `OTHER COV` = other_cov,
    FAMILY = family,
    DIET = diet,
    AGE = log2_age
  ) %>%
  mutate(outcome = case_when(
    outcome == 'FOLAT' ~ 'FOLATE',
    outcome == 'VKFE' ~ 'TIBC',
    outcome == 'Cros' ~ 'CTX',
    outcome == 'log2_Cros' ~ 'log2_CTX',
    outcome == 'VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'HOLOTC',
    outcome == 'log2_VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'log2_HOLOTC',
    TRUE ~ outcome
  ))

kbl(AIC_child_young, caption = 
      "Decrease of The Akaike information criterion (AIC) after addition of given outcome to linear models, children under 3 years. The change of AIC indicate out-of-sample predictive accuracy of the models and was bounded to -30 (large importance of a covariate) and 0 (no to negliable importance)") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')
Decrease of The Akaike information criterion (AIC) after addition of given outcome to linear models, children under 3 years. The change of AIC indicate out-of-sample predictive accuracy of the models and was bounded to -30 (large importance of a covariate) and 0 (no to negliable importance)
outcome estimand AGE SEX BREASTFEED OTHER COV DIET FAMILY
MASS_Perc mean NA -0.9 0.3 -19.4 2.1 NA
HEIGHT_Perc mean NA 25.4 2.6 -12.2 2.1 NA
BMI_PERC mean NA -2.0 2.0 -6.3 4.6 NA
M_per_H_PERC mean NA -1.0 2.0 -6.6 4.4 NA
GLY mean 2.4 2.6 4.8 NA 4.2 NA
TC mean 2.0 2.2 5.3 NA 4.0 NA
HDL mean 2.4 -1.0 6.2 NA 4.5 NA
LDL mean 1.4 2.2 2.5 NA 1.1 NA
log2_TG mean 2.6 -0.9 3.7 NA 1.5 NA
Ca mean -8.3 2.5 6.1 2.5 4.9 NA
P mean -10.0 2.2 -0.3 NA 3.7 NA
Mg mean 1.8 -2.7 0.1 0.0 3.9 NA
Se mean 2.5 0.8 3.3 2.0 4.2 NA
Zn mean 2.5 2.5 7.0 1.7 3.1 NA
FE mean -7.1 2.3 5.3 -0.6 3.8 NA

4.3.2 Heatmap

Open code 
heat_map(AIC_child_young, mixef = TRUE)

5 Old children

5.1 Diet effects

5.1.1 Unstandardized effects

Open code 

diet_child_old <- read.xlsx("gitignore/data/diet_child_old_mixeff.xlsx") %>% 
  mutate(outcome = clean_outcome_names(outcome)) %>%
  mutate(outcome = case_when(
    outcome == 'FOLAT' ~ 'FOLATE',
    outcome == 'VKFE' ~ 'TIBC',
    outcome == 'Cros' ~ 'CTX',
    outcome == 'log2_Cros' ~ 'log2_CTX',
    outcome == 'VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'HOLOTC',
    outcome == 'log2_VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'log2_HOLOTC',
    TRUE ~ outcome
  ))

diet_child_old <- diet_child_old %>%   
  mutate(across(.cols = c(VN_OM_diff, VG_OM_diff, VN_VG_diff), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(VN_OM_diff))

kbl(diet_child_old, caption = 
      "Differences between diet groups across outcomes in children > 3 years of age, based on quantile regression modelling") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "(A) VN vs OM" = 3, 
                     "(B) VG vs OM" = 3, "(C) VN vs VG" =3)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')

(A) VN vs OM
(B) VG vs OM
(C) VN vs VG

5.1.2 Standardized effects by 1SD

Open code 

ids <- 11:45
inde <- min(ids)-1
ids <- ids-inde

sds <- vector("double", max(ids))

for(i in seq_along(ids)){
  sds[i] <- ifelse(grepl("log2", diet_child_old[(i),1]),
                   sd(log2(dat_child_old[,(i+inde)]), na.rm=TRUE),
                   sd(dat_child_old[,(i+inde)], na.rm=TRUE))
}

sds[length(ids) +1] <- 1

diet_child_old_Z <- diet_child_old %>% 
  mutate(SD = sds) %>% 
  mutate(VN_OM_diff = VN_OM_diff/SD,
         VG_OM_diff = VG_OM_diff/SD,
         VN_VG_diff = VN_VG_diff/SD) %>% 
  select(-SD) %>% 
  mutate(across(.cols = c(VN_OM_diff, VG_OM_diff, VN_VG_diff), ~ round(.x, 2)))

kbl(diet_child_old_Z, caption = 
      "Standardized differences between diet groups across outcomes in children > 3 years of age, based on quantile regression modelling") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "(A) VN vs OM" = 3, 
                     "(B) VG vs OM" = 3, "(C) VN vs VG" =3)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')

5.2 Vulcano plot

5.2.1 VN vs OM

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig27'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/',plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_child_old_Z %>% 
           filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VN_OM_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VN_OM_P,
             b_coe = VN_OM_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VN+', 
                 'OM+'))) %>%
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels = c('OM+', 'VN+', 'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>%
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha = 1, 
             box.padding = 0.5, 
             size = 3,
             seed = 17) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') + 
           ggtitle('VN vs. OM, children > 3 years') +
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
         )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

5.2.2 VG vs OM

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig28'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/',plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_child_old_Z %>% 
           filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VG_OM_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VG_OM_P,
             b_coe = VG_OM_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VG+', 
                 'OM+'))) %>%
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels = c('OM+', 'VG+', 'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>% 
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha=1, 
             box.padding = 0.5,
             size = 3,
             seed = 17) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') +  
           ggtitle('VG vs. OM, children > 3 years') +
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
         )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

5.2.3 VN vs VG

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig29'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/', plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_child_old_Z %>% 
             filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VN_VG_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VN_VG_P,
             b_coe = VN_VG_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VN+', 
                 'VG+'))) %>%
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels=c('VG+', 
                                      'VN+', 
                                      'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>% 
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha = 1, 
             box.padding = 0.5,
             size = 3,
             seed = 16) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', 
                y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') + 
           ggtitle('VN vs VG, children > 3 years') +
           
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
         )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

5.3 Covariates importance

5.3.1 Table

Open code 
AIC_child_old <- read.xlsx("gitignore/data/AIC_child_old_mixeff.xlsx") %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 1))) %>% 
  mutate(outcome = clean_outcome_names(outcome)) %>%
  rename(
    SEX = aSEX,
    BREASTFEED = Breast_Feed,
    `OTHER COV` = other_cov,
    FAMILY = family,
    DIET = diet,
    AGE = log2_age
  ) %>%
  mutate(outcome = case_when(
    outcome == 'FOLAT' ~ 'FOLATE',
    outcome == 'VKFE' ~ 'TIBC',
    outcome == 'Cros' ~ 'CTX',
    outcome == 'log2_Cros' ~ 'log2_CTX',
    outcome == 'VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'HOLOTC',
    outcome == 'log2_VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'log2_HOLOTC',
    TRUE ~ outcome
  ))

kbl(AIC_child_old, caption = 
      "Decrease of The Akaike information criterion (AIC) after addition of given outcome to quantile regression model, children > 3 years. The change of AIC indicate out-of-sample predictive accuracy of the models and was bounded to -30 (large importance of a covariate) and 0 (no to negliable importance).") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')
Decrease of The Akaike information criterion (AIC) after addition of given outcome to quantile regression model, children > 3 years. The change of AIC indicate out-of-sample predictive accuracy of the models and was bounded to -30 (large importance of a covariate) and 0 (no to negliable importance).
outcome estimand AGE SEX BREASTFEED OTHER COV DIET FAMILY

PTH mean 2.5 1.4 2.2 NA 3.9 -6.3
log2_CTX mean -0.3 2.5 0.1 3.7 5.2 2.7
P1NP mean 0.4 0.5 2.7 4.3 1.1 1.7
UI mean 2.6 0.8 2.2 NA 4.6 -6.0
UREA mean 1.9 -1.0 -2.3 NA -1.9 -0.2
log2_CREA mean -27.4 1.3 1.9 NA 4.3 0.0
UA mean 2.5 0.6 2.4 NA 4.2 2.5
log2_HOLOTC mean -2.5 2.5 0.2 -2.4 1.6 0.1
log2_HCY mean -12.1 2.2 1.0 NA 4.7 0.2
log2_MMA mean -1.3 1.3 1.3 NA 2.2 -1.8
log2_VIT_D mean -6.7 2.4 2.6 0.2 2.0 -13.8
FOLATE mean 1.9 2.2 2.5 2.1 -4.8 -0.2
log2_IGF1 mean -26.9 2.4 2.0 NA 3.2 -4.4

5.3.2 Heatmap

Open code 
heat_map(AIC_child_old, mixef = TRUE)

6 Adults

6.1 Diet effects

6.1.1 Unstandardized effects

Open code 

diet_adult <- read.xlsx("gitignore/data/diet_adult_mixeff.xlsx") %>% 
  mutate(outcome = clean_outcome_names(outcome)) %>%
  mutate(outcome = case_when(
    outcome == 'FOLAT' ~ 'FOLATE',
    outcome == 'VKFE' ~ 'TIBC',
    outcome == 'Cros' ~ 'CTX',
    outcome == 'log2_Cros' ~ 'log2_CTX',
    outcome == 'VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'HOLOTC',
    outcome == 'log2_VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'log2_HOLOTC',
    TRUE ~ outcome
  ))

diet_adult2 <- diet_adult %>%   
  mutate(across(.cols = c(VN_OM_diff, VG_OM_diff, VN_VG_diff), ~ round(.x, 2)))

kbl(diet_adult2, caption = 
      "Differences between diet groups across outcomes in adults, based on quantile regression modelling") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "(A) VN vs OM" = 3, 
                     "(B) VG vs OM" = 3, "(C) VN vs VG" =3)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')
Differences between diet groups across outcomes in adults, based on quantile regression modelling
(A) VN vs OM
(B) VG vs OM
(C) VN vs VG

6.1.2 Standardized effects by 1SD

Open code 

ids <- 6:46

sds <- vector("double", length(ids))
meds <- diet_adult %>% filter(estimand == 'mean')

for(i in seq_along(ids)){
  sds[i] <- ifelse(grepl("log2", diet_adult[(i), 1]),
                   sd(log2(dat_adult[, (i + 5)]), na.rm = TRUE),
                   sd(dat_adult[,(i + 5)], na.rm = TRUE))
}

sds[length(ids) +1] <- 1
sds[length(ids) +2] <- 1

diet_adult_Z <- diet_adult %>% 
  mutate(SD = sds) %>% 
  mutate(VN_OM_diff = VN_OM_diff/SD,
         VG_OM_diff = VG_OM_diff/SD,
         VN_VG_diff = VN_VG_diff/SD) %>% 
  select(-SD) %>% 
  mutate(VG_OM_P = if_else(VG_OM_P < 1e-5, 1e-5, VG_OM_P)) %>% 
  mutate(across(.cols = c(VN_OM_diff, VG_OM_diff, VN_VG_diff), ~ round(.x, 2)))


kbl(diet_adult_Z, caption = 
      "Standardized differences between diet groups across outcomes in adults, based on mixed-effects models") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "(A) VN vs OM" = 3, 
                     "(B) VG vs OM" = 3, "(C) VN vs VG" =3)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')
Standardized differences between diet groups across outcomes in adults, based on mixed-effects models
(A) VN vs OM
(B) VG vs OM
(C) VN vs VG

6.2 Vulcano plots

6.2.1 VN vs OM

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig31'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/',plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_adult_Z %>% 
           filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%

           mutate(
             pv_adj = VN_OM_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VN_OM_P,
             b_coe = VN_OM_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VN_OM_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VN_OM_P,
             b_coe = VN_OM_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VN+', 
                 'OM+'))) %>%
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels = c('OM+', 'VN+', 'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>%
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha = 1, 
             box.padding = 0.6, 
             size = 2.7,
             seed = 17) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') + 
           ggtitle('VN vs. OM, adults') +
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
         )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

6.2.2 VG vs OM

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig32'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/',plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_adult_Z %>% 
           filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VG_OM_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VG_OM_P,
             b_coe = VG_OM_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VG+', 
                 'OM+'))) %>%
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels = c('OM+', 'VG+', 'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>% 
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha=1, 
             box.padding = 0.6,
             size = 2.8,
             seed = 17) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') +  
           ggtitle('VG vs OM, adults') +
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
           ) 
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

6.2.3 VN vs VG

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig33'

path = paste0('gitignore/figures/', plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac, diet_adult_Z %>% 
             filter(estimand != 'log(OR)') %>% 
           mutate(int = interaction(outcome, estimand)) %>%
           
           mutate(
             pv_adj = VN_VG_P_adj,
             pv_raw = VN_VG_P,
             b_coe = VN_VG_diff) %>% 
           
           mutate(pv_raw = if_else(pv_raw < 1e-5, 1e-5, pv_raw)) %>% 
           
           mutate(
             m_ylab = -log10(pv_raw),
             m_xlab = b_coe,
             rescat = if_else(
               pv_raw >= 0.05, 
               'P>0.05', 
               if_else(
                 b_coe > 0, 
                 'VN+', 
                 'VG+'))) %>%
           
           
           mutate(
             rescat = factor(rescat, 
                             levels=c('VG+', 
                                      'VN+', 
                                      'P>0.05')),
             meta_labels = if_else(pv_raw < 0.05, int, '')) %>% 
           
           ggplot(aes(x = b_coe, 
                      y = m_ylab, 
                      color = rescat, 
                      alpha = rescat,
                      label = meta_labels)) +
           
           geom_point(size = 2, shape = 16, alpha = 0.6) + 
           
           geom_text_repel(aes(
             x = m_xlab,
             y = m_ylab), 
             show.legend = FALSE, 
             alpha = 1, 
             box.padding = 0.6,
             size = 2.8,
             seed = 16) +
           
           labs(x = 'Standardized difference', 
                y = '-log10 (P-value)') +
           
           scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = '') + 
           ggtitle('VN vs VG, adults') +
           
           theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+
           coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5),
                           xlim = c(-1.7, 1.7))
           ) 
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)
  
} else {assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

6.3 Covariates importance

6.3.1 Table

Open code 

AIC_adult <- read.xlsx("gitignore/data/AIC_adult_mixeff.xlsx") %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 1))) %>% 
  mutate(outcome = clean_outcome_names(outcome)) %>% 
  filter(!outcome %in% c('AL_adult', 'BREAKS')) %>%
  rename(
    SEX = aSEX,
    `OTHER COV` = other_cov,
    FAMILY = family,
    DIET = diet,
    AGE = aAGE
  ) %>%
  mutate(outcome = case_when(
    outcome == 'FOLAT' ~ 'FOLATE',
    outcome == 'VKFE' ~ 'TIBC',
    outcome == 'Cros' ~ 'CTX',
    outcome == 'log2_Cros' ~ 'log2_CTX',
    outcome == 'VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'HOLOTC',
    outcome == 'log2_VIT_AKTB12' ~ 'log2_HOLOTC',
    TRUE ~ outcome
  ))

kbl(AIC_adult, caption = 
      "Decrease of The Akaike information criterion (AIC) after addition of given outcome to mixed effect models, for adults. The change of AIC indicate out-of-sample predictive accuracy of the models and was bounded to -30 (large importance of a covariate) and 0 (no to negliable importance).") %>% 
  kable_styling("striped",full_width = T) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')
Decrease of The Akaike information criterion (AIC) after addition of given outcome to mixed effect models, for adults. The change of AIC indicate out-of-sample predictive accuracy of the models and was bounded to -30 (large importance of a covariate) and 0 (no to negliable importance).
outcome estimand AGE SEX OTHER COV DIET FAMILY

MCV mean 1.1 -5.1 NA -2.8 2.1
PTH mean 0.9 1.0 NA -5.2 -0.4
log2_CTX mean -8.7 1.7 2.9 3.1 2.2
log2_P1NP mean -6.3 2.2 0.4 1.6 2.2
UI mean -1.4 2.1 NA 3.1 -10.8
log2_UREA mean 0.4 -16.3 NA -12.3 0.3
log2_CREA mean -0.1 -74.7 NA -4.8 0.5
UA mean -2.8 -87.8 NA 3.7 1.3
log2_HOLOTC mean 2.1 -7.6 -0.4 -0.4 -13.3
log2_HCY mean 2.1 -55.6 NA 1.6 -1.6
log2_MMA mean -1.7 -1.3 NA -1.7 1.5
log2_VIT_D mean 1.4 2.1 0.7 -3.3 -6.4
FOLATE mean 1.2 -14.8 -2.7 -8.7 -18.8

6.3.2 Heatmap

Open code 
heat_map(AIC_adult, mixef = TRUE)

7 Vulcano matrix

7.1 Main matrix

7.1.1 Prepare

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig35'
path = paste0('gitignore/figures/', plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  fig23 <- fig23 + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                       plot.title = element_blank())
  fig24 <- fig24+ theme(legend.position = 'none',
                      plot.title = element_blank())
  fig25 <- fig25 + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                       plot.title=element_blank())

  fig27 <- fig27 + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                       plot.title = element_blank())
  fig28 <- fig28+ theme(legend.position = 'none',
                      plot.title = element_blank())
  fig29 <- fig29 + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                       plot.title = element_blank())

  fig31 <- fig31 + theme(legend.position = 'bottom',
                       plot.title = element_blank())
  fig32 <- fig32 + theme(legend.position = 'bottom',
                      plot.title = element_blank())
  fig33 <- fig33 + theme(legend.position = 'bottom',
                       plot.title = element_blank())
  }

7.1.2 Create subfigures

Open code 

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  child_young_volc <- ggarrange(fig23 + 
                       theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.x = element_blank()) , 
                   fig24 + 
                       theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.x = element_blank()), 
                   
                   fig25 + 
                       theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.x = element_blank()),
                   nrow = 1, 
                   ncol = 3,
                   widths = c(1.1, 1, 1),
                   labels = c('A', '', '')
                   )
  
  child_young_volc <- annotate_figure(
    child_young_volc,
    top = text_grob("Children < 3 years", face = "bold", size = 10))
                  
  
  child_old_volc <- ggarrange(

                   fig27 + 
                       theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.x = element_blank()) , 
                   
                   fig28 + 
                       theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.x = element_blank()), 
                   
                   fig29 + 
                       theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.x = element_blank()),
                   nrow = 1, 
                   ncol = 3,
                   widths = c(1.1, 1, 1),
                   labels = c('B', '', '')
                   )
  child_old_volc <- annotate_figure(
    child_old_volc,
    top = text_grob("Children > 3 years", face = "bold", size = 10))              
                   
  adult_volc <- ggarrange(                   
                   fig31,
                   fig32 + 
                       theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.y = element_blank() ), 
                   fig33 + 
                       theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
                             axis.title.y = element_blank()) ,
                   nrow = 1, 
                   ncol = 3,
                   widths = c(1.1, 1, 1),
                   labels = c('C', '', '')
                   )
  
  adult_volc <- annotate_figure(
    adult_volc,
    top = text_grob("Adults", face = "bold", size = 10))       
  }

7.1.3 Figure

Open code 
if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  assign(plotac,
       ggarrange(
         child_young_volc, 
         child_old_volc, 
         adult_volc,
         nrow = 3, 
         ncol = 1,
         heights = c(1, 1, 1.33))
       )
  
  saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
  get(plotac)} else {
    assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

7.2 All children matrix

Everything in at once

Open code 
plotac <- 'fig36'
path = paste0('gitignore/figures/', plotac, '.rds')

if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  fig19 <- fig19 + theme(legend.position = 'bottom',
                       plot.title = element_blank())
  fig20 <- fig20 + theme(legend.position = 'bottom',
                      plot.title = element_blank())
  fig21 <- fig21 + theme(legend.position = 'bottom',
                       plot.title = element_blank())
  
  child_all_volc <- ggarrange(
    fig19,
    fig20 + 
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
            axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
    
    fig21 +
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
            axis.title.y = element_blank()),
    nrow = 1, 
    ncol = 3,
    widths = c(1.1, 1, 1))
  
   assign(plotac,
          annotate_figure(
            child_all_volc,
            top = text_grob("All children", 
                            face = "bold", 
                            size = 10)))
   
   saveRDS(get(plotac), file = path)
   get(plotac)
} else {
    assign(plotac, readRDS(path))
    get(plotac)}

8 Heatmap matrix

Open code 
h1 <- heat_map(AIC_child_young, mixef = TRUE, main = 'Children < 3 years old', listt = TRUE)
h2 <- heat_map(AIC_child_old, mixef = TRUE, main = 'Children > 3 years old', listt = TRUE)
h3 <- heat_map(AIC_adult, mixef = TRUE, main = 'Adults', listt = TRUE)

grid.arrange(grobs = list(h1$gtable, h2$gtable, h3$gtable),
             nrow = 1, ncol = 3)
Open code 

plotac <- 'heatmaps_mixef_combo'
path = paste0('gitignore/figures/', plotac, '.pdf')
if(file.exists(path) == FALSE){
  pdf(path, width = 10, height = 6)  
  grid.arrange(grobs = list(h1$gtable, h2$gtable, h3$gtable),
             nrow = 1, ncol = 3)
  dev.off()
}

path <- paste0('gitignore/figures/', plotac, '.pdf')
if (!file.exists(path)) {
  pdf(path, width = 10, height = 6)  
  grid.arrange(grobs = list(h1$gtable, h2$gtable, h3$gtable),
             nrow = 1, ncol = 3)
  dev.off()
}

path <- paste0('gitignore/figures/', plotac, '.tiff')
if (!file.exists(path)) {
  tiff(path, width = 10, height = 6, units = 'in', res = 400) 
  grid.arrange(grobs = list(h1$gtable, h2$gtable, h3$gtable),
             nrow = 1, ncol = 3)
  dev.off()
}

9 Reproducibility

Open code
